function.message: Handled the next inbox item successfully. I identified all bills related to Badger and added YAML frontmatter (OCR extraction) to each while preserving original body text, then removed the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS, context), inspected 99_system before task work, read nested AGENTS in entered folders, resolved entity via canonical cast file, used schema-defined finance fields, preserved original note bodies during frontmatter migration, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md asked to 'OCR all bills related to Badger'. Canonical entity in 10_entities/cast/badger.md established target identity. Finance search showed exactly four purchase bills with related_entity Badger, each was read and then updated with bill-schema frontmatter from 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md. Per process-next-inbox-item and inbox-processing-v2-update workflows, inbox item was deleted after successful completion.

wrote frontmatter updates to 4 bill files
